_meta.notes: TaskCreate PostToolUse stdin for the FIRST task in a parallel-batch fire. The companion fixture task_create_parallel_burst_second.json represents the second fire in the same batch. Both task files (id 10 and id 11) are pre-written to the team tasks dir before the hook is invoked, simulating the race window where both files land before either PostToolUse hook reads the filesystem. Under the strict-equality predicate (count == 1) both fires reject and Arm is never emitted; under the positive-bound predicate (count >= 1) both fires emit Arm and PACT:watch-inbox idempotency absorbs the redundant emit.

tool_input.subject: First task in parallel-batch dispatch
tool_input.description: Initial task in a parallel TaskCreate batch.
